ingredients_text: Seasoned potatoes 31% (potato 26%, lactose-free _butter_, potato flakes, spices (e.g. tarragon, paprika, black pepper), iodized salt, potato fiber, aroma), tarragon-butter sauce 26% (water, lactose-free _cooking cream_, lactose-free _butter_, modified corn starch, vinegar powder, sugar, sunflower oil, flavorings (including paprika), iodized salt, spices (including turmeric, white pepper, tarragon, cayenne), lemon juice powder, emulsifier (sunflower lecithin), acidity regulator (citric acid)), chicken ball 26% (chicken meat, water, breadcrumbs (_wheat_), rapeseed oil, pea protein, spices (including paprika, coriander, ginger), iodized salt, pea fiber, flax meal, brown sugar, dextrose, flavorings, antioxidant (E 300), potato flour), carrot 17%.
ingredients_text_en: Seasoned potatoes 31% (potato 26%, lactose-free _butter_, potato flakes, spices (e.g. tarragon, paprika, black pepper), iodized salt, potato fiber, aroma), tarragon-butter sauce 26% (water, lactose-free _cooking cream_, lactose-free _butter_, modified corn starch, vinegar powder, sugar, sunflower oil, flavorings (including paprika), iodized salt, spices (including turmeric, white pepper, tarragon, cayenne), lemon juice powder, emulsifier (sunflower lecithin), acidity regulator (citric acid)), chicken ball 26% (chicken meat, water, breadcrumbs (_wheat_), rapeseed oil, pea protein, spices (including paprika, coriander, ginger), iodized salt, pea fiber, flax meal, brown sugar, dextrose, flavorings, antioxidant (E 300), potato flour), carrot 17%.
ingredients_text_fi: Maustetut perunat 31 % (peruna 26 %, laktoositon _voi_, perunahiutale, mausteet (mm. rakuuna, paprika, mustapippuri), jodioitu suola, perunakuitu, aromi), rakuuna-voikastike 26 % (vesi, laktoositon _ruokakerma_, laktoositon _voi_, muunnettu maissitärkkelys, etikkajauhe, sokeri, auringonkukkaöljy, aromit (mm. paprika), jodioitu suola, mausteet (mm. kurkuma, valkopippuri, rakuuna, cayenne), sitruunamehujauhe, emulgointiaine (auringonkukkalesitiini), happamuudensäätöaine (sitruunahappo)), kanapyörykkä 26 % (broilerinliha, vesi, korppujauho (_vehnä_), rypsiöljy, herneproteiini, mausteet (mm. paprika, korianteri, inkivääri), jodioitu suola, hernekuitu, pellavarouhe, fariinisokeri, dekstroosi, aromit, hapettumisenestoaine (E 300), perunajauho), porkkana 17%.
ingredients_text_sv: Kryddad potatis 31 % (potatis 26 %, laktosfri _smör_, potatisflinga, kryddor (bl.a. dragon, paprika, svartpeppar), joderat salt, potatisfiber, arom), dragon-smörsås 26 % (vatten, laktosfri _matlagningsgrädde_, laktosfri _smör_, modifierad majsstärkelse, ättikapulver, socker, solrosolja, aromer (bl.a. paprika), joderat salt, kryddor (bl.a. gurkmeja, vitpeppar, dragon, cayennepeppar), citronsaftpulver, emulgeringsmedel (solroslecitin), surhetsreglerande medel (citronsyra)), kycklingbullar 26% (kycklingkött, vatten, skorpsmulor (_vete_), rypsolja, ärtprotein, kryddor (bl.a. paprika, koriander, ingefära), joderat salt, ärtfiber, linkross, farinsocker, dextros, aromer, antioxidationsmedel (E 300), potatismjöl), morot 17 %.
